raw_consumer_statement: First I have been working for hard to improve my credit so I can purchase a place hopefully summer of XXXX. I fortunately have raised it from below XXXX to XXXX since XXXX. I noticed some charges via XXXX of which I am a member but did NOT make. I don't know if an employee was trying to make a vacation for theirselves or someone but I did NOT make these charges. It was also very strange the way the charges were made : XX/XX/XXXX {$350.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$350.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$350.00} credit XX/XX/XXXX {$350.00} credit XX/XX/XXXX. {$350.00} XX/XX/XXXX {$350.00} So the way these were charged, credited, then charged again on the same day doesn't even make since unless someone was trying to somehow work a scam on a vacation. I contacted my credit card company. But because I am a member with XXXX they found the charges legit, but I did NOT make these charges and I am on a fixed income of SS {$1200.00} a month and can not afford to pay these.
